conditions.description: PRD must have required frontmatter fields
At least one wireframe directory must exist with a .tsx file
conditions.check: Each wireframe in features[active_feature].wireframes has a directory with ≥1 .tsx file

conditions.description: Each wireframe must have a metadata.json
conditions.check: metadata.json exists in each wireframe directory

conditions.description: All wireframes must be approved by Jeff
conditions.check: All wireframes in features[active_feature].wireframes have approval.status === 'approved'

conditions.description: Feature branch must exist from latest develop
conditions.check: features[active_feature].branch exists and is checked out

conditions.description: Service PRDs must exist for each touched service
conditions.check: features[active_feature].service_prds has entries for all services listed in main PRD frontmatter
At least one task checked off in each service's track file

conditions.description: PR URL must be recorded and exist on GitHub
conditions.check: features[active_feature].pr_url is set and `gh pr view` succeeds

conditions.description: Track file must be marked complete
conditions.check: Track file frontmatter has status: completed
